overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through grassy fields toward a large medieval stone castle. The character approaches the main gate, crosses a cobblestone bridge, enters through the archway past guards, then turns around and exits back toward the countryside. Bright sunny day with clear skies and warm lighting.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a winding dirt path through grassy fields toward the distant castle walls

winding dirt trail through the grass leading toward the castle

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grasslands under a bright blue sky. The massive medieval stone castle looms ahead in the distance, with scattered trees and tall grass surrounding the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle outer approach with wooden fencing

events.description: wooden fences appear along the right side of the path as the castle walls grow closer

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it becomes more defined with wooden fencing and stone walls

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence lining the right side of the path
low stone retaining wall on the left side

segments.scene_description: The path narrows with wooden fences appearing on the right and stone walls on the left. The castle walls become more detailed and prominent as Geralt approaches the outer perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone bridge leading to main gate

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to cobblestone upon entering the bridge approach

agents.ego_description: walking onto the cobblestone bridge approach toward the main castle gate archway

large stone archway entrance with heavy wooden doors
wooden fence railings along the bridge sides
wooden fence railings along the bridge sides
crimson flags with gold emblems hanging from the gate walls
crimson flags with gold emblems hanging from the gate walls

segments.scene_description: The dirt path gives way to a cobblestone bridge with wooden railings. Red banners hang on either side of the imposing stone archway ahead as Geralt approaches the main entrance.

events.description: passing under the main gate archway into the shadowed interior gatehouse

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate archway past armored guards standing watch

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at attention holding a polearm weapon
additional guards and horses visible in the courtyard beyond the gate

entered.detail: shadowed stone corridor passing through the thick castle walls
interior castle courtyard visible through the archway exit

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes under the heavy stone archway into the shadowed gatehouse where armored guards stand watch. The interior courtyard with horses and additional structures is visible beyond the tunnel exit.

events.description: character turns 180 degrees and begins walking back out of the castle gate

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back out of the castle gate, looking toward the rural countryside

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the gate wall watching the character exit

entered.detail: wooden building with a large water wheel visible across the water

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns around and exits the castle, walking back across the cobblestone bridge. A water wheel building becomes visible to the left as he looks out over the rural landscape and the castle walls recede behind him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open expanse of a rural grassland toward the imposing fortifications of a medieval castle. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through wide fields of tall grass under a bright blue sky, with the massive stone structure looming in the far distance. As he advances, the open landscape gradually tightens, and the trail narrows between emerging wooden fences and stone walls. The scene then shifts in scale as the distant silhouette of the castle transforms into detailed, prominent walls that dominate the frame upon approaching the outer perimeter.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an approach into a fortified castle to a retreat back into the open countryside. It begins as a dirt path gives way to a cobblestone bridge with wooden railings, leading toward an imposing stone archway adorned with red banners. As the camera moves forward, the bright daylight shifts into the shadows of the gatehouse where armored guards stand watch, momentarily revealing a bustling interior courtyard with horses beyond the tunnel. The perspective then turns around to exit the castle, crossing the bridge once more as the stone walls recede. Finally, the scene opens back up to the rural landscape, bringing a water wheel building into view to the left under the clear sunny sky.
